title: get() inlines map_kube_error logic instead of calling the helper
description: lib.rs:108-117: get() has an inline match identical in structure to map_kube_error(). put() calls map_kube_error(). The duplication means a future change to error mapping (e.g., adding a new HTTP error code) must be made in two places. Rewrite: replace the inline match with .map_err(map_kube_error) to match put().
